default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore SystemHustle's lead-gen services for Castle's recruiting business.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Castle's Challenge:** Finding qualified clients is the main bottleneck. Past lead-gen agencies failed, delivering only 2 meetings from a 4-month "shotgun" campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**SystemHustle's Pitch:** A targeted service that monitors market signals (e.g., new projects, leadership changes) to identify hiring urgency *before* roles go public.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Proposed Strategy:** SystemHustle will act as a third-party connector, framing Castle as a "trusted partner" to introduce pre-vetted candidates to companies with confirmed needs.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Decision Path:** Kelly will present the proposal to owner Curtis, who must approve any service with a cost. A follow-up is set for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Castle's Recruiting Business

  - [**Focus:** Technical roles in construction (PMs, VDC engineers) and aerospace (UAVs, robotics).](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**Model:** Contingency-based, requiring salaries \>$100k–$150k to justify the effort.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [**Structure:** Recruiters run a "full desk" (25% sales, 75% recruiting).](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Primary BD Method:** Manual outreach (LinkedIn, cold calls) and candidate-driven marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Key Challenge:** Connecting with decision-makers through the noise of daily sales messages.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Past Agency Failures

  - [Two agencies hired last year failed to deliver on guarantees of booked meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Result:** Only 2 meetings generated from a 4-month campaign, with no resulting business.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Conclusion:** The agencies' "shotgun" approach was ineffective, creating skepticism about similar proposals.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

### SystemHustle's Proposed Solution

  - [**Method:** Proactive market monitoring to identify hiring signals before roles are posted.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
    1.  [**Identify Signals:** Track new projects, leadership changes, or office expansions.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
    2.  [**Confirm Urgency:** Target companies struggling to fill roles (e.g., job posts active \>60 days).](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
    3.  [**Third-Party Introduction:** Frame Castle as a "trusted partner" to make the initial connection.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [**Value Proposition:** Delegate BD to SystemHustle for scalable, targeted outreach, freeing up Castle's recruiters to focus on placements.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kelly:** Present SystemHustle's proposal to owner Curtis upon his return next week.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**Leonid:** Follow up with Kelly via WhatsApp next Wednesday to discuss Curtis's decision.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [**Leonid:** Send relevant case studies to Kelly to support the proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/GSaH78oWDvgnsX5jBgzyvKs9ARjy6eB6?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
